patch.value: Verify remote telemetry stack receives events and data flows to [redacted_monitoring_ui]

After the oversized-event pruning fix, the telemetry queue is draining correctly (60MB→4.5MB→clearing). Need to verify: (1) the remote stack at [redacted_telemetry_host] is ingesting events properly, (2) [redacted_monitoring_ui] dashboards show event counts, (3) [redacted_collector]/[redacted_log_store]/[redacted_trace_store]/[redacted_metrics_service] all receiving data, (4) [redacted_queue_service] and [redacted_datastore] processing events. Note: credentials must NOT be committed to git.

[redacted_datastore] contains [redacted_event_count] events spanning 2026-04-25 to 2026-05-01. [redacted_metrics_service] scraping 6 active targets (all up). Synthetic event accepted by API, processed through queue, persisted in [redacted_datastore]. Local pm health --check-telemetry reports ok=true with probe=ok and queue_draining=true. Full report at scripts/prod/telemetry/reports/2026-05-01-stack-verification.md.
